title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 9–12, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. A Marine force confronts Arlong, but the scene exposes how terrifying and entrenched his pirates are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone go over there and negotiate with their captain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you can't buy'em off for 2 million, then just get rid of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He stopped a cannon- ball... with his teeth...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do you still wish to proceed with the negotiations?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no need for you to expend a whole lot of effort just to get rid of some trash.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Those humans are truly foolish if they think they can challenge us out on the seas...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: Arlong pirates crew officer KUROOBI (rayfish-type fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Heh, this'll be quite a sight if all 3 of our officers are fighting.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That ship won't even last 3 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Commodore! It seems that the cannonball failed to explode.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: fire another shot then. This is our declaration of war!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We must show them that we're prepared to fight no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Our enemies are fishmen so do not let down your guards, men!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
